general: I need some Dunkies. Is that what they call it?
I don't understand humans. Put on my favorite dress as Nora and they look at me like I'm lunch. Put it on as myself and they look at me like I stole THEIR lunch right outta the work fridge!
All I wanna do is go home and make myself a fluffahnuttah.

winston: Now hear me out: tonight, what if we-
I swear, I have no idea where your train track pieces went!
sandoval: Alright, I'll talk to Winston for ya!
anton: You have strawberry this week, right?
nora: I'm way cuter this way. Or am I...?
